THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, STEVEN $3,760.54 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,895.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
